details.productUrlName: Overclocked Electromancer Extended Art Ripple Foil

customAttributes.description:
At the beginning of combat on your turn, you may pay EEE. If you do, put a +1/+1 counter on Overclocked Electromancer.
Whenever Overclocked Electromancer attacks, double its power until end of turn.
Whenever Overclocked Electromancer deals combat damage to a creature, if that creature was dealt excess damage this turn, you get X E, where X is that excess damage.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 6/14/2024. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
